code: import React from'react';import{PieChart,Pie,Cell,Tooltip,Legend,ResponsiveContainer}from'recharts';import{Paper,Typography,Box}from'@mui/material';import{useTheme}from'@mui/material/styles';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AlertSeverityPieChart=_ref=>{let{alerts}=_ref;const theme=useTheme();const severityCounts=alerts.reduce((acc,alert)=>{acc[alert.severity]=(acc[alert.severity]||0)+1;return acc;},{});const data=Object.keys(severityCounts).map(key=>({name:key,value:severityCounts[key]}));const COLORS={CRITICAL:theme.palette.error.main,HIGH:theme.palette.warning.main,MEDIUM:theme.palette.info.main,LOW:theme.palette.grey[500]};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Paper,{sx:{p:2,display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',height:'100%',background:'#1f2937'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"h6",gutterBottom:true,children:"Alerts by Severity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:300,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(PieChart,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Pie,{data:data,cx:"50%",cy:"50%",labelLine:false,outerRadius:80,fill:"#8884d8",dataKey:"value",nameKey:"name",label:_ref2=>{let{cx,cy,midAngle,innerRadius,outerRadius,percent,index}=_ref2;const radius=innerRadius+(outerRadius-innerRadius)*0.5;const x=cx+radius*Math.cos(-midAngle*(Math.PI/180));const y=cy+radius*Math.sin(-midAngle*(Math.PI/180));return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("text",{x:x,y:y,fill:"white",textAnchor:x>cx?'start':'end',dominantBaseline:"central",children:`${(percent*100).toFixed(0)}%`});},children:data.map((entry,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cell,{fill:COLORS[entry.name]},`cell-${index}`))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{contentStyle:{backgroundColor:theme.palette.background.paper,border:`1px solid ${theme.palette.divider}`}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Legend,{})]})})]});};export default AlertSeverityPieChart;
